content:
📌 Version 8.8 – Finalizing Character Alteration, Unique Archetypes, and Fate Influence


🚀 This iteration finalizes the one-time character alteration ritual, the permanence of unique archetypes, and the ability for certain players to influence the Fate Wheel.

📜 1. Character Alteration Ritual – A Single Opportunity Per Class

📜 Only one student per class may perform the ritual, and it can be challenged by another player.

✔ How the Ritual Works:
• Only one student per class may claim the ritual.
• If another student wants it, they must challenge and outroll them.
• If the challenger loses, they suffer a major punishment.
• The winner permanently alters their character but gains a corresponding weakness.

✔ Possible Ritual Outcomes:
• Faction Change → Gains a Buff, Loses an Ability
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 522 (chunk 522/555)
